description_long: This playground set features a wooden multi-play structure with a pitched roof, elevated platform, and a ramp with steps leading up to the main playhouse. Attached to the side is a bridge-like walkway with vertical slats, providing both safety and climbing opportunities. Adjacent to the main structure is a classic swing set with two swings and a bucket seat, all supported by sturdy wooden frames. The entire setup is placed on a rectangular patch of green artificial turf, bordered by low barriers and decorative elements at the corners. The playhouse includes safety railings and a partially enclosed area beneath the roof, offering shade and a lookout point for children. The design is both functional and inviting, suitable for parks or residential community spaces.
description: A wooden multi-play playground set with a roofed playhouse, bridge, and swing set on green turf, featuring safety railings and decorative borders.
description_view_0: Front view showing the playhouse with pitched roof, entry ramp, and the swing set extending forward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the swing set with two swings and the bridge connecting to the playhouse.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the bridge, the back of the playhouse, and the ramp with steps.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the swing set, the side of the playhouse, and the entry ramp.
